name: Golf2U
about: Golf2U specializes in professional golf simulator installation and sales, operating across Florida, New York, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and New England. With over 10 years of experience, the company designs custom simulator setups tailored to specific spaces and budgets, offering both complete package deals and DIY consultations. Their services include expert installation, space planning, and final calibration to ensure optimal performance in various home environments such as garages, spare rooms, basements, and sheds. Golf2U partners with a wide range of launch monitor manufacturers and simulator retailers to provide comprehensive solutions and competitive pricing.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-designed simulator installations tailored to any space
Partnerships with premium launch monitor manufacturers for best pricing
Year-round practice capability in climate-controlled environments
Access to virtual coaching and detailed shot analytics

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to provide your own golf clubs for use with the simulator systems.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify policies on outside food or drinks, as they appear to focus on residential installations rather than public facilities.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time would depend on the simulator software and setup, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer family-friendly simulator solutions suitable for home installations, making it accessible for juniors and family use.
